description_long: This is a modern athletic running shoe featuring a dynamic color scheme of black, orange, teal, and silver. The upper is constructed with a synthetic mesh material, providing breathability and a honeycomb texture for visual interest and ventilation. The shoe has a streamlined silhouette with reinforced overlays in orange and black, and teal accents outlining the midsole and upper. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style, integrated into the upper for a secure fit. The heel and toe areas are reinforced for durability, while the midsole appears cushioned for comfort and shock absorption. The outsole is partially visible and appears to be made of rubber with a patterned tread for traction.
description: A modern, black and orange athletic running shoe with teal accents, mesh upper, and a cushioned sole. Features a criss-cross lacing system and reinforced overlays for durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black mesh toe box, teal accent on the sole, and the criss-cross lacing system.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange overlays, honeycomb mesh texture, and teal and silver midsole details.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the orange heel reinforcement, perforated details, and the black collar opening.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible mesh, orange overlays, and teal accents along the midsole.
